TRIGGER Access review SOURCE governance-store OBSERVED May 3, 5:18 AM AFFECTED ASSET datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.risk_policy_exception_register Suggested actions Mark resolved Writes a governance request update when supported. metrics.title: Governance Atlas
metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center S Skyler Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 39.8% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. GLOSSARY & CDE REGISTRY Shared business meaning, anchored to data Glossary terms link to source-of-record assets. Critical Data Elements have stricter ownership, certification, and lineage requirements. + New term Glossary 20 CDE Registry 18 Showing 5 of 18 CDE registry rows CDE SOURCE-OF-RECORD COLUMN OWNER RECERT STATUS Customer Identity Quality Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Recert Due Customer Profile Source column unavailable Unassigned 180d Recert Due Customer Profile Coverage Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Healthy Customer Stewardship Queue Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Healthy Finance Exception Review Source column unavailable Unassigned 90d Recert Due Status and recertification are registry metadata values. Quality test-run or recertification workflow proof appears only when backed evidence is returned. Atlas AI Grounded in Databricks Genie evidence - no raw rows read x Ask about glossary terms, CDEs, reviewers, version history, and asset associations using governed metadata. I never read raw row values. TRY ASKING ? Which CDEs are due for review? → ? What assets are linked to the selected glossary term? → ? Summarize reviewer status for critical CDEs
